creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I admit I was not aware this project kept odd minor version numbers for devel version. I'm aware many projects follow this practice, but it is not universal and I did not check their docs (my fault).

I do no plan to add a devel version actually. I tested upgrading the software because it was crashing on startup for me on arm64 arch, but maybe it is an issue only happening to me. So, for now, I'll keep this as a local patch.

I could create a devel port if other users reported crashes too, or maybe I should investigate differences between 2.6.1 and 2.7.4 to understand what is causing the crashes. But would do this only if needed for the benefit of the project/others.
